courses.title: Programming
courses.description: Learn the fundamentals of programming, including syntax, logic, and problem-solving techniques. This course is designed for beginners and covers the essential building blocks of coding.

tableOfContents.title: Introduction to Programming
tableOfContents.description: Overview of programming concepts and history.

courses.title: Variables
courses.description: Understand how to store and manage data in your programs using variables. This course covers variable types, naming conventions, and best practices for data storage.

courses.title: Conditions and Loops
courses.description: Master the control flow of your programs with conditional statements and loops. Learn how to make decisions and repeat actions efficiently.

tableOfContents.title: Conditional Statements
tableOfContents.description: Using if, else, and elif statements.

courses.title: Functions
courses.description: Discover how to organize your code into reusable blocks with functions. This course covers function definition, arguments, return values, and scope.

tableOfContents.title: Defining Functions
tableOfContents.description: How to define and call functions.

courses.title: Classes and Objects
courses.description: Dive into object-oriented programming with classes and objects. Learn how to model real-world entities, encapsulate data, and create reusable code structures.

tableOfContents.title: Creating Classes and Objects
tableOfContents.description: How to define classes and create objects.
